scripts.storage:link: php -r "if(!is_dir('resources/storage/app/public')){mkdir('resources/storage/app/public',0755,true);} echo 'Diretorio criado.';" && if not exist "public\imgs" mklink /J "public\imgs" "resources\storage\app\public\imgs" && if exist "public\imgs" echo Link simbolico criado: public/imgs -> resources/storage/app/public/imgs
scripts.migrate:fresh: php vendor/bin/phinx rollback -e development -t 0 && php vendor/bin/phinx migrate -e development && php db/seeders/run_seeds.php
scripts.deploy: npm run prod && copy /Y resources\index.html public\index.html && npm run migrate:fresh && npm run storage:link
